properties.body:
[South-eastern Baltic] LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 016/26
MAINTENANCE DREDGING IN PROGRESS IN SEAWAY CHANNEL, WITHIN AREA
BOUNDED BY:
55-43.96N 021-03.47E
55-43.94N 021-03.63E
55-43.92N 021-04.11E
55-43.84N 021-04.61E
55-43.57N 021-04.47E
55-43.60N 021-04.27E
55-43.64N 021-04.30E
55-43.78N 021-03.40E.
VESSELS ADVISED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION NEAR THE DREDGING WORKS
AREA. PASS AT MINIMUM SPEED IF WORKS ARE EXECUTED.
ALL VESSELS MUST KEEP DISTANCE OF AT LEAST 30 METERS AWAY FROM
DREDGING WORKS EXECUTING VESSELS AND DO NOT OBSTRUCT THEIR
MANEUVERING.
FOR MORE DETAILS CONTACT VTD.
